conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, I'm looking for a book that's supposed to be on the third floor, but it's not on the shelf where the catalog says it should be.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, that happens more than you'd think. Did you check the cart by the elevator? Returned books usually sit there for a day before getting reshelved.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I didn't even know about that cart. Let me run up and check.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: If it's not there, come back down and I'll place a hold for you. We'll grab it from the returns area within twenty-four hours.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That works. Thanks so much for the help.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: No problem at all. Let me know if you can't find it upstairs.

questions.stem: Why does the woman approach the man?

options.A: To pay an overdue fine for a book
options.B: To ask about a book missing from the shelf
options.C: To recommend a new book for purchase
options.D: To complain about the third-floor noise

questions.explanation: 女学生因书未在书架上而求助。其他选项与对话内容无关。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Order the book from another library
options.B: Check the cart by the elevator on the third floor
options.C: Leave the library and try a bookstore
options.D: Ask another staff member for help

questions.explanation: 男馆员建议先查电梯旁的小推车，女生表示要去看看。其他选项不是下一步。

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hi Professor Lin. I was hoping you could sign off on my plan to take statistics this summer instead of next fall.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Sure, let's take a look. You know, summer statistics is condensed — it covers a full semester in six weeks. That's a lot.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I figured. But I'm not taking anything else, so I'd be able to focus on it.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That actually makes a big difference. Most students who struggle with the summer section are juggling a part-time job or another course. If you're free, you should be fine.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Great. So you'll sign the form?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'll sign it now. Just promise me you'll start the practice problems in week one — don't wait until the first exam.

questions.stem: Why is the man meeting with the advisor?

options.A: To request approval for a summer statistics course
options.B: To withdraw from a current statistics course
options.C: To change his academic major to mathematics
options.D: To complain about a difficult professor

questions.explanation: 男生想得到顾问批准夏季选统计课。其他选项与对话内容无关。

questions.stem: What does the advisor imply about the summer course?

options.A: It is easier than the fall version
options.B: It usually challenges students with competing commitments
options.C: It will be cancelled this year
options.D: It is only open to mathematics majors

questions.explanation: 顾问暗示通常那些有兼职或另选课的学生才会吃力。其他选项与对话不符。

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hey, did you grab the last printer pass at the front desk earlier this afternoon?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, sorry — was that really the last one? I honestly didn't realize.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: It's fine. The thing is, I need to print my paper tonight. Any chance I can borrow it after you?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Definitely. I'll be done in about an hour. I'll slide it right under your door when I'm done.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: You're a total lifesaver. Thanks, Marco.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: No problem — just leave it in my mailbox when you're finished tonight.

questions.stem: What does the woman ask the man for?

options.B: Use of his printer pass when he is finished
options.C: A ride to the campus print shop

questions.explanation: 女生明确请求借打印通行证。其他选项与对话不符。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do next?

options.A: Buy a second printer pass for the woman
options.B: Cancel his printing plans for the night
options.C: Drop the pass off at her door once he finishes
options.D: Go to the library to find another pass

questions.explanation: 男生答应打印完后塞到她门下。其他选项与他说的话相悖。

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hi — I tried to use the app to pay for my coffee but it kept giving me an error message.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, the payment system is down across all the campus cafes today. We've been telling people since the morning.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yikes. Do you take cash, or should I come back tomorrow?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Cash is fine. You can also tap your campus card if you have one.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Perfect, I have my card. Sorry about that.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: No worries — happens all morning. Hopefully they fix the app by tonight.

questions.stem: What is the main reason for the man's problem?

options.A: His coffee order was prepared incorrectly
options.B: The cafe's payment app is not working today
options.C: He forgot to bring his campus card
options.D: The cafe ran out of his favorite drink

questions.explanation: 对话核心是支付应用故障。其他选项与文本不符。

questions.stem: What does the man decide to do?

options.A: Use his campus card to pay
options.B: Come back to the cafe the next morning
options.C: Ask another customer to lend him cash

questions.explanation: 男生说有校园卡，并选择用卡付款。其他选项与他选的方案不符。

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Excuse me — I'm trying to sign up for the climbing wall but the website keeps saying the session is full.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, Thursday slots fill up almost instantly. Have you tried Friday morning? They added two extra sessions this term.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Friday morning could work. Is there a waitlist for Thursday though, just in case?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: There is, but honestly I'd grab the Friday spot now. The Thursday waitlist almost never moves.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Okay, I'll register for Friday right now then.

questions.stem: What problem is the woman trying to solve?

options.A: She cannot find space in a climbing wall session
options.B: She locked her membership card in the locker room
options.C: She has an injury and needs special instruction
options.D: She wants to cancel her gym membership

questions.explanation: 女生想报名攀岩但课已满。其他选项与对话不符。

questions.stem: What does the man imply about the Thursday waitlist?

options.A: It is faster to clear than the Friday list
options.B: It usually does not produce open spots
options.C: It requires extra payment to join
options.D: It is closed for the rest of the term

questions.explanation: 男员工说候补几乎不动，暗示别等候补。其他选项与他建议相悖。
